scripts.start: nohup node log-server.js > .codebuddy/server.log 2>&1 & echo $! > .codebuddy/server.pid && echo '日志服务器已启动 (PID: $(cat .codebuddy/server.pid))'
scripts.stop: if [ -f .codebuddy/server.pid ]; then kill $(cat .codebuddy/server.pid) 2>/dev/null && rm .codebuddy/server.pid && echo '服务器已停止'; else echo '服务器未运行'; fi
scripts.status: if [ -f .codebuddy/server.pid ] && kill -0 $(cat .codebuddy/server.pid) 2>/dev/null; then echo '服务器运行中 (PID: $(cat .codebuddy/server.pid))'; else echo '服务器未运行'; fi
scripts.logs:
ls -la .codebuddy/logs/ && echo -e '
=== 服务器日志 ===' && tail -20 .codebuddy/server.log 2>/dev/null || echo '无服务器日志'
scripts.clean-logs: rm -rf .codebuddy/logs/* && echo '.codebuddy/server.log' | xargs rm -f && echo '日志已清理'
